query_used:
SELECT * FROM composition_instances
WHERE notes ILIKE '%TRUNCATE%'
ORDER BY instance_id
LIMIT 20

rows.notes: Confocal Filtering: Use a pinhole to truncate out-of-focus light and diffraction artifacts from different planes. | DAMAGE_OP: TRUNCATE | ANALOG: bandlimiting | SOURCE: gemini_batch_4

Real Roots Only: Truncating the analysis to natively existing elements, entirely ignoring equations that demand non-real answers. | DAMAGE_OP: TRUNCATE | ANALOG: bandlimiting | SOURCE: gemini_batch_13
Geometric Complexity Theory: Restrict to orbit closures where algebrization does not apply. | DAMAGE_OP: TRUNCATE | SOURCE: aletheia_deep_fill
Resistance Loading: Truncating the high-Q resonance to 'broaden' the bandwidth by intentionally dissipating energy. | DAMAGE_OP: TRUNCATE | ANALOG: bandlimiting | SOURCE: gemini_batch_7
